Q4 MCQ Not checked
Technical • COMPUTER SCIENCE & IT • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

A Boolean function  is to be implemented using only 2 × 1 multiplexers, the number of 2 × 1 multiplexers required are ________.

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
The Boolean function F is on 4 variables. To implement 4 variable Boolean function a 16 × 1 multiplexer is required.
To release 16 × 1 MUX, number of 2 × 1 multiplexers required are 16 – 1 = 15.

Q9 MCQ Not checked
Technical • COMPUTER SCIENCE & IT • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

The table which shows the necessary levels at J and K inputs to produce every possible flip-flop state transition is called

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
The excitation table of the flip-flop shows the required excitation to the flip-flop, or the required
input to the flip-flop, to go from the given state to the next particular state.

Not attempted

NAT
Correct answer: 12.5
Solution

12.5 [12.0 - 13.0]

Q18 MCQ Not checked
Technical • COMPUTER SCIENCE & IT • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

For a flip-flop with provisions for preset and clear, which of the following options is correct?

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
The preset input drives the flip-flop to a set state while the clear input drives it to a reset state.
Hence, both are disabled or only one is enabled at a time.
